strategy: Naive (zero-shot) pipeline: Independently discovered 3 database APIs. (1) PSP: Downloaded Kinase_Substrate_Dataset.gz from phosphosite.org, parsed gzipped TSV, filtered for human SUB_ORGANISM. (2) SIGNOR: Queried getData.php?organism=9606, parsed TSV, filtered for mechanism=phosphorylation with protein-protein entries and non-empty residue. (3) UniProt: Queried rest.uniprot.org REST API for reviewed human proteins with phospho modifications, parsed 'Modified residue' features with kinase attribution ('by KINASE' pattern). Merged all entries by (kinase|substrate|site) key, aggregating supporting databases, peptides, and UniProt IDs. Final atlas: 28530 unique triplets, 655 kinases, 1435 multi-DB entries (5.0%).
